name: org-storage
title: Organization Storage
description: Report how much storage an organization is using by summing shared_file.file_size, converted to a human-friendly unit. Delegates to the read-only database skill.
setup_instructions: Requires the `database` skill to be installed and configured with a read-only connection to the target database. This skill holds no credentials of its own — it issues only read-only SELECT queries through the `database` CLI.

install.linux: sudo apt-get install -y python3 || sudo yum install -y python3
